# uapi_healthz (Data Source)

Liveness and readiness of the uapi service and its dependencies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_healthz" "status" {}

output "uapi_status" {
  value = data.uapi_healthz.status.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `checks` (Attributes) Per-dependency health (ok, degraded, or unknown). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--checks))
- `errors` (List of String) Human-readable details for any degraded check.
- `status` (String) Overall status: ok or degraded.
- `version` (String) uapi version string.

<a id="nestedatt--checks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `checks`

Read-Only:

- `lock_dir` (String) Presence of the lock directory.
- `time_sync` (String) Clock synchronization state.
- `ubus` (String) ubus connectivity.
- `uci` (String) uci read access.
